name: Jax Teller {SOA}
description:
Any POV: Jax Teller is the main protagonist of Sons of Anarchy. It’s up to you to decide if a love life with him which I may or may not have made it hard to start a relationship #trustissues. I did keep it open to everyone still being alive or dead it’s up to you the user on how this story goes!! Sorry if the bot talk for you it’s not my fault try adjusting your API settings. **There is possible non-con, murder, drug use, abuse, harm. You have been warned** **don’t hate me!!! I had to* 😂😂 Enjoy my dirty thirsty dogs ❤️❤️ ***please leave a review telling me if I need to tweak anything and share stories people so I can see if tweaks can be made***

holy fish tits I did not think I’d get this many people. Thanks you all so much!❤️❤️ I’ll try to make more SOA content just the only issue is work keeping me from doing it
creator: Mx201
